ground_truth.title: Fashion 2025 - Runway Trends, Fashion Designers, and Style Tips
ground_truth.main_content: Harper's Bazaar Fashion section presents comprehensive coverage of the latest runway trends, fashion designers to watch, and style advice for the season. Featured articles include Bazaar Editors' picks for the best winter coats for women, The Social Calendar by Harry Winston, and the triangle scarf as winter's latest it accessory. The page highlights the best gloves for winter, sneakers that Bazaar editors are obsessed with, and fashion-approved snow boot outfits proving function and style can coexist. Additional content covers winter scarves, controversial celebrity fashion looks, the rise of quarter zip sweaters, and what to shop at Nordstrom's half-yearly sale. Style guides include the little black dress as a wardrobe icon, the 'undone' fashion trend for spring 2025, the 'Marty Supreme Orange' color trend inspired by celebrities, and eyeglasses as a fashion statement. Holiday content features gifts for women who have everything, chocolate brown as winter's elegant color trend, velvet styling beyond the holiday party, and holiday shipping deadlines. Gift guides cover white elephant gifts, stocking stuffers, personalized jewelry, and black accessories. Luxury content includes Rado watches worth gifting, Pantone's 2026 Color of the Year, Chanel accessories from the NYC-themed show, minimalist winter outfits, and the best gifts for mom. Runway coverage encompasses Gucci's pre-fall 2026 collection, leather bomber jackets for winter, winter sweater trends, and holiday party outfit inspiration. The section also features fashion photography features and Donna Karan's travel and layering expertise.
with: All you need to know about what's new on the runway, the designers to watch, the best fashions of the season, and style advice on how to wear them.
The Best Winter Coats for Women, According to Bazaar Editors
Proof that function and style can coexist
The Little Black Dress Is a Wardrobe Icon
75 Unique Gifts for Women Who Have It All
